name: 加利尔AR | 破坏者
descriptionEn: A less expensive option among the terrorist-exclusive assault rifles, the Galil AR is a serviceable weapon in medium to long-range combat. Its green base coat has been covered with scattered white drawings. Each drawing tells a story, some more memorable than others
descriptionZh: 在T专用的突击步枪中，这把武器是较为便宜的选择，加利尔AR是一把中远距离作战的耐用武器。 这把武器使用绿色涂层，搭配上散乱的白色花纹。 每段旋律，都代表一种心情，每幅图画，都讲述一个故事，但愿人长久。
